chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 440 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on Nazir report dated 07.05.2021 2. For hearing of CMA No.1823/2021 3. For hearing of main case 22.01.2025 Messrs. Faiz Ahmed and Sualeha Baig, advocates for the petitioner Mr. Nadir Hussain advocate holds brief for Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate for respondent Mr. Akhtar Hussain, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel this petition is squarely covered by the Division Bench judgment of this Court in the case of Habib Bank Limited and others vs. Cantonment Board Clifton Karachi and others reported as 2018 CLC 116 and the same has been upheld by the Hon’ble Supreme Court in Civil Appeals No.1363 to 1365 of 2018 (Cantonment Board Clifton vs. Habib Bank Limited. Learned counsel states that this petition may also be disposed of in mutatis mutandis application of the ratio illumined supra. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
